features.name: NMR File Format Support
features.description: Registers file handlers for .jdx and .nmrium formats so Datagrok can recognise and parse NMR data files on upload or file-browser open. Includes a JDX content validator used to gate format detection.
features.evidence_summary: jdxFileHandler and nmriumFileHandler share the fileHandler role for complementary NMR formats; checkNmriumJdx is a boolean validator tightly scoped to JDX content, and the 1.0.0 changelog entry records their initial introduction.

features.name: NMR Spectrum Viewer
features.description: Embeds the NMRium interactive spectrum viewer as a Datagrok file-preview panel, supporting both native .nmrium and JCAMP-DX (.dx/.jdx) formats with content-dependent view selection.
features.evidence_summary: Both fileViewer functions render NMR spectra via the NMRium component (one per format), the readme describes this viewer capability, and the 1.1.0 changelog entry specifically records the content-dependent view improvement.
